requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — NSL Conformity Context and Tropical Derating
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——NSL合格背景及热带降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——NSL合格背景及熱帶降額

summary.en: The National Standards Laboratory of Liberia (NSL) is the national standards and metrology institution referenced for Liberia standards conformity, while LERC and LEC control electricity-sector and grid-connection acceptance. A Liberia-specific published EVSE safety standard or mandatory EV charger certification scheme could not be confirmed as of 2026-06-14. For imported EV chargers, IEC 61851-1 should be treated as the practical conductive-charging safety baseline, with IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers. Safety review should cover control pilot behavior, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, residual-current protection, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, enclosure ingress protection, emergency stop where applicable, and installation instructions. Liberia's humid coastal tropical climate requires corrosion, condensation, and humidity derating in addition to ordinary electrical safety evidence.
summary.zh: 利比里亚国家标准实验室（NSL）是利比里亚标准和计量合格相关机构，LERC和LEC则控制电力行业及并网接入验收。截至2026年6月14日，未能确认利比里亚已公开发布EVSE专属安全标准或强制充电桩认证制度。对于进口电动汽车充电桩，应将IEC 61851-1作为传导充电安全的实务基线，直流充电桩还应提供IEC 61851-23证据。安全审查应覆盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、剩余电流保护、过流和过温保护、外壳防护等级、适用时的急停，以及安装说明。利比里亚潮湿沿海热带气候要求在普通电气安全证据之外，补充腐蚀、凝露和湿度降额。
summary.zht: 賴比瑞亞國家標準實驗室（NSL）是賴比瑞亞標準和計量合格相關機構，LERC和LEC則控制電力行業及併網接入驗收。截至2026年6月14日，未能確認賴比瑞亞已公開發布EVSE專屬安全標準或強制充電樁認證制度。對於進口電動汽車充電樁，應將IEC 61851-1作為傳導充電安全的實務基線，直流充電樁還應提供IEC 61851-23證據。安全審查應覆蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、剩餘電流保護、過流和過溫保護、外殼防護等級、適用時的急停，以及安裝說明。賴比瑞亞潮濕沿海熱帶氣候要求在普通電氣安全證據之外，補充腐蝕、凝露和濕度降額。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
IEC 62752 / residual-current and protective-device requirements where applicable
NSL conformity assessment route for imported electrical equipment — verify directly

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but includes China-specific connector, signaling, and communication assumptions. China reports to GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234, and GB/T 27930 can support engineering review but do not establish IEC 61851 conformity for Liberia, do not validate 60 Hz operation, and do not prove suitability for humid tropical outdoor installation.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号和通信假设。GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930报告可支持工程审查，但不能证明面向利比里亚的IEC 61851符合性，不能验证60 Hz运行，也不能证明适用于潮湿热带户外安装。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號和通訊假設。GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930報告可支持工程審查，但不能證明面向賴比瑞亞的IEC 61851符合性，不能驗證60 Hz運行，也不能證明適用於潮濕熱帶戶外安裝。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, enclosure IP and IK evidence appropriate to humid tropical outdoor conditions, corrosion-resistant enclosure and fastener specifications, condensation control, protective-device ratings for 120/240 V 60 Hz supply, English installation and safety instructions, and a direct confirmation of NSL import/conformity expectations. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not enough without clause-level mapping and retesting for the target connector and 60 Hz supply.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、认可IEC安全测试报告、直流产品IEC 61851-23证据、适合潮湿热带户外条件的外壳IP和IK证据、耐腐蚀外壳和紧固件规格、凝露控制、适用于120/240 V 60 Hz供电的保护器件额定值、英文安装和安全说明，并直接确认NSL进口/合格要求。若未针对目标接口和60 Hz供电进行逐条映射和重新测试，单独的GB/T 18487测试报告并不足够。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、認可IEC安全測試報告、直流產品IEC 61851-23證據、適合潮濕熱帶戶外條件的外殼IP和IK證據、耐腐蝕外殼和緊固件規格、凝露控制、適用於120/240 V 60 Hz供電的保護器件額定值、英文安裝和安全說明，並直接確認NSL進口/合格要求。若未針對目標接口和60 Hz供電進行逐條映射和重新測試，單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告並不足夠。

mandatory_status.target: Practical gate — Liberia-specific mandatory EVSE certification not confirmed publicly; NSL conformity expectations, LERC/LEC acceptance, project-owner specifications, and IEC 61851 evidence should be confirmed before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not direct IEC 61851 evidence for Liberia without additional mapping and testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. A Liberia-facing EVSE package should include IEC 61851-1 evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers, 60 Hz safety validation, tropical humidity and corrosion derating, and direct NSL/LERC/LEC confirmation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向利比里亚的EVSE资料包应包括IEC 61851-1证据、直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据、60 Hz安全验证、热带湿度和腐蚀降额，以及直接NSL/LERC/LEC确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向賴比瑞亞的EVSE資料包應包括IEC 61851-1證據、直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據、60 Hz安全驗證、熱帶濕度和腐蝕降額，以及直接NSL/LERC/LEC確認。
